ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the sample belongs to */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism of the sample */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism the sample is from */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease associated with the sample, if any */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the organism */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the organism */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the organism */,
  "individual" TEXT /* Identifier for the individual organism */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Cell type of the sample */,
  "ancestry_category" TEXT /* Ancestry category of the organism */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the organism */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample is stored */,
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_material_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_type_id") REFERENCES material_types ("material_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the assay was performed on */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay */,
  "comment_file_uri" TEXT /* URI to the comment file associated with the assay */,
  "comment_fraction_identifier" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fraction of the sample used in the assay */,
  "comment_label" TEXT /* Label used in the assay */,
  "comment_instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the assay */,
  "comment_precursor_mass_tolerance" TEXT /* Precursor mass tolerance for the assay */,
  "comment_fragment_mass_tolerance" REAL /* Fragment mass tolerance for the assay */,
  "comment_dissociation_method" REAL /* Dissociation method used in the assay */,
  "comment_cleavage_agent_details" TEXT /* Details of the cleavage agent used in the assay */,
  "comment_modification_parameters" TEXT /* Modification parameters for the assay */,
  "comment_modification_parameters_1" TEXT /* Additional modification parameter 1 */,
  "comment_modification_parameters_2" TEXT /* Additional modification parameter 2 */,
  "comment_modification_parameters_3" TEXT /* Additional modification parameter 3 */,
  "assay_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay was performed */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assay */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used for the assay */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality control for the assay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assays_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assays_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type (e.g., organism part) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_type_id")
)
